subcodes.first_line: O 'Andalib! Upon thee be the glory of God, the Lord of all worlds. In the Persian tongue do We address thee, verily We love to [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا عندلیب علیک بهاء الله رب العالمین بلسان پارسی ندا مینمائیم انا نحب ان
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @praise and encouragement, @purity of heart; sincerity of intention; sanctity, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @service to others; to the Cause of God
